title: TRENING INDYWIDUALNY (COACHING) WE WŁOSZECH: JAKIE SĄ OPINIE O ZINTEGROWANYM SYSTEMIE PRODUKCJI DROBIU?
description: A guide to conducting individual coaching sessions to enhance biosecurity on integrated poultry farms in Italy. It outlines key discussion steps, stakeholder roles and SMART and PRS-Dz methodologies for planning and evaluating biosecurity improvements.
